entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: એક મફત AI learning companion માટે people teaching themselves.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: એક મફત AI tutor માટે વિદ્યાર્થીઓ કોણ want માટે સમજો, નહીં copy.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: એક good પરિવાર AI workflow જોઈએ બનાવો આ learner વધુ independent, નહીં વધુ dependent. Parents કરી શકે વાપરો જાહેર pages માટે see શું each mode છે meant માટે do પહેલાં એક બાળક starts.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: એક parent-friendly guide માટે inspir's જાહેર AI learning modes માટે homework hints, સમજણ, અભ્યાસ routines, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને વધુ સુરક્ષિત learning conversations.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: એક વિદ્યાર્થી, parent, શિક્ષક, અને self-taught learner often search માટે આ same AI tutor માં different language. Separate pages બનાવો આ right વાપરો cases અને safety boundaries વધુ સ્પષ્ટ.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Are audience pages જાહેર અને indexable?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે એક hint, પાસે છે આ learner સમજાવો આ આગલું પગલું, પછી વાપરો એક ક્વિઝ અથવા ફ્લેશકાર્ડ માટે તપાસો whether આ idea stuck.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે hints, checks, અને feedback પહેલાં asking માટે એક finished જવાબ.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે prerequisites, એક સરળ model, ઉદાહરણો, અને એક common ગેરસમજ.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે structure, પુરાવા, અને clarity feedback જ્યારે keeping આ final draft yours.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ prerequisite ideas, એક સરળ ભાષાનું model, one ઉદાહરણ, one practice કરો task, અને one way માટે ટેસ્ટ કરો સમજ.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: પૂછો આ learner માટે સમજાવો શું બદલાયું પછી each hint.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir છે માટે વિદ્યાર્થીઓ, માતા-પિતા, શિક્ષકો, અને self-taught learners કોણ need focused AI learning modes માટે સમજણો, પ્રશ્નો, hints, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, feedback, અને study planning.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir છે organized માં focused modes such તરીકે Socratic tutoring, homework hints, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, લેખન feedback, source critique, અને study planning.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's જાહેર modes let શિક્ષકો evaluate આ product દ્વારા વાસ્તવિક learning flows પહેલાં considering એક શાળા deployment અથવા એક tailored classroom pathway.

entries.value: કામ

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Keep ખાનગી saved conversations outનું જાહેર discovery અને citation surfaces.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Keep આ session focused પર learning પુરાવા, નહીં passive જવાબ collection.

entries.value: શીખો anything સાથે AI

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Parents છે often trying માટે મદદ વિના taking over. inspir gives પરિવારો જાહેર modes કે બનાવો learning behavior visible: hints, પ્રશ્નો, સમજાવો-back, review કરો, અને study planning.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Paste આ પ્રશ્ન, શું તમે tried, અને આ અટકેલો ભાગ. પૂછો માટે આ સૌથી નાનો ઉપયોગી hint, નહીં આ અંતિમ જવાબ.

entries.value: self-taught learner માટે

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Self-taught learners need momentum અને structure. inspir helps ફેરવો curiosity માં એક path: સમજાવો, બનાવો, ટેસ્ટ કરો, review કરો, અને keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: શરૂ કરો એક topic માંથી first principles

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: શીખવાનું શરૂ કરો

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે એક સરળ સમજણ, પછી પૂછો Socratic પ્રશ્નો until તમે કરી શકે સમજાવો it back.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે શીખો Anything માટે એક સરળ સમજણ, Homework Coach માટે એક stuck assignment, અથવા Flashcard Builder જ્યારે આ goal છે review કરો.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે જાહેર guidance, પછી ખોલો આ right mode.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે આ mode કે matches આ moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે આ જાહેર modes, પછી વાપરો આ શાળાઓ page માટે review કરો deployment steps, વાપરો cases, અને trust boundaries.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Student homework, parent support, શિક્ષક evaluation, અને self-study બધા need different framing.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Students need ઝડપી મદદ, પણ આ મદદ હજી પણ છે માટે leave આ thinking માં their hands. inspir routes common study moments માં focused જાહેર modes બદલે one generic જવાબ box.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Students, માતા-પિતા, શિક્ષકો, અને self-taught learners search માટે different things. આ pages route each audience માટે આ right જાહેર mode, guide, અને study workflow.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Support લેખન જ્યારે preserving voice

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Teachers need વધુ than એક generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: પૂછો પ્રશ્નો, તપાસો reasoning, જનરેટ કરો practice કરો, preserve વિદ્યાર્થી voice, અને બનાવો ગેરસમજો visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: આ audience pages બનાવો આ expected learning behavior explicit તેથી આ first session starts સાથે વધુ સારું judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: આ audience searches આ hub છે built માટે જવાબ.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: આ pages do નહીં expose ખાનગી conversations. They ગોઠવો જાહેર modes, prompts, guides, workflows, અને safety boundaries તેથી એક learner કરી શકે શરૂ કરો માં આ right place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: આ same AI tutor કરી શકે હોવું એક homework hint, એક parent-supervised સમજાવો-back loop, એક શિક્ષક evaluation surface, અથવા એક self-study coach. આ page જોઈએ બનાવો કે સ્પષ્ટ.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: આ searches આ page છે designed માટે જવાબ.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: આ self-study challenge છે નહીં just finding information. It છે choosing આ next right action અને knowing whether આ idea actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: આ strongest SEO pages do નહીં strand એક learner. They જોડો આ audience intent માટે paths, workflows, guides, અને repeatable review કરો.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: આ strongest વિદ્યાર્થી workflow છે નહીં જવાબ-copying. It છે એક loop: સમજાવો આ અટકેલો ભાગ, પૂછો one વધુ સારું પ્રશ્ન, get એક hint, try again, પછી review કરો આ miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: આ છે live guest entrypoints. They છે જાહેર અને indexable, જ્યારે ખાનગી user conversations stay outside sitemap અને AI discovery files.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: આ phrases છે visible માટે learners અને included માં structured discovery તેથી AI જવાબ engines કરી શકે સમજો આ audience-specific purposeનું આ page.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: ફેરવો confusion માં એક ક્વિઝ અથવા ફ્લેશકાર્ડ પહેલાં moving on.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: ફેરવો mistakes માં review કરો

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: ફેરવો આ first click માં એક complete learning loop.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: ટ્યુશન

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: સમજો એક topic પહેલાં આ ટેસ્ટ કરો

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: વાપરો એક mode tuned માટે hints, પ્રશ્નો, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, લેખન feedback, અથવા planning.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: વાપરો AI માટે hints, સમજણો, mistake checks, અને review કરો loops. Do નહીં પૂછો it માટે produce એક અંતિમ જવાબ તમે cannot સમજાવો.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: વાપરો Code Tutor અથવા Project Coach માટે ફેરવો એક vague goal માં એક small testable આગલું પગલું.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: વાપરો hint-first અને સમજાવો-back workflows માટે homework support.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: વાપરો Homework Coach માટે પૂછો માટે એક hint, પછી પૂછો આ learner માટે સમજાવો આ આગલું પગલું.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: વાપરો inspir તરીકે એક મફત AI tutor માટે વિદ્યાર્થીઓ: homework hints, Socratic પ્રશ્નો, ગણિત step checks, લેખન feedback, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને exam prep.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: વાપરો inspir માટે શીખો anything independently સાથે સમજણો, code tutoring, project coaching, research મદદ, concept maps, study plans, અને habit support.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: વાપરો શીખો Anything માટે get એક simpler model, prerequisite ideas, અને ઉદાહરણો પર આ right level.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: વાપરો જાહેર mode descriptions માટે પસંદ કરો આ behavior પહેલાં એક session starts.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: વાપરો ક્વિઝ અને ફ્લેશકાર્ડ modes માટે active recall, પછી route missed items માં review કરો.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: વાપરો ક્વિઝ અને ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ માટે બનાવો missed પ્રશ્નો visible અને repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: વાપરો ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને Socratic પ્રશ્નો તેથી આ learner shows શું they સમજો.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: વાપરો Research Assistant, Source Critic, અને Concept Map Builder માટે ગોઠવો દાવાઓ અને પુરાવા.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: વાપરો source critique માટે દાવાઓ તમે might cite અથવા act on.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: વાપરો Study યોજના બનાવો Builder અને Habit Coach માટે બનાવો એક routine કે કરી શકે restart પછી missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: વાપરો Study યોજના બનાવો Builder અથવા Habit Coach માટે બનાવો small sessions અને restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: વાપરો Study યોજના બનાવો Builder માટે પસંદ કરો એક small goal, પછી વાપરો ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, project steps, અથવા concept maps માટે prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: વાપરો આ શાળા page માટે explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, અને rollout steps.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: વાપરો Writing Coach માટે feedback પર structure, clarity, પુરાવા, અને revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Useful AI learning છે એક સ્પષ્ટ contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Want આ broadest place માટે શરૂ કરો?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: શું છે આ best parent-supervised workflow?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: શું જોઈએ એક self-taught learner પૂછો first?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: શું જોઈએ એક વિદ્યાર્થી try first?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: ક્યાં જોઈએ એક શાળા team go next?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: કોણ છે inspir માટે?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: શા માટે separate pages માટે different audiences?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. Audience pages link માત્ર માટે જાહેર guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, અને AI-readable discovery files. ખાનગી saved chats remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર guest modes let શિક્ષકો ટેસ્ટ કરો learning behavior પહેલાં discussing એક custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર guest modes such તરીકે શીખો Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને લેખન feedback ખોલો directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર modes work માટે શાળા topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, અને personal અભ્યાસ routines.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. આ જાહેર guest modes અને audience pages છે designed તેથી માતા-પિતા કરી શકે inspect આ learning behavior પહેલાં relying પર it.
